title: Marketplace Manager - Amazon India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Amazon India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amazon India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
